scripts: script_before_close_body (TBD — capture during 'Вставка кода' tab fill)

notes: Tilda's save form has ~40+ fields. Sending only a subset works — Tilda merges with current values.
customcssfile expects a URL to a .css file in Tilda CDN. Use upload_file (upload an image-like asset with .css extension).
headlinefont / textfont accept: TildaSans (default), Arial, Helvetica, Georgia, plus any Google/Adobe-Typekit family name.
After updating site settings, all pages need to be re-published for changes to land on CDN.
